Properties.Description: NASUN API Gateway for X Leaderboard system
Sync community members from UserProfiles daily at midnight KST
Properties.Name: nasun-sync-community-members-daily

Properties.Description: OAuth 2.0 token refresh every 70 minutes (mathematically guaranteed 24/7 uptime)

Properties.AlarmDescription: OAuth 2.0 token refresh failed - immediate attention required
OAuth token not refreshed for 3+ hours - check EventBridge rule (90min schedule)
EventBridge failed to invoke token refresh Lambda - check DLQ for details
CRITICAL: Refresh Token is invalid - manual OAuth 2.0 re-authentication required immediately!
CRITICAL: Secrets Manager update failed - Refresh Token may be invalidated!
INFO: Refresh Token Rotation occurred - new token issued by Twitter API

Properties.Description: V3 Pipeline: Trigger daily data collection at 9:00 AM KST
Properties.Name: nasun-daily-data-collection

BootstrapVersion.Description: Version of the CDK Bootstrap resources in this environment, automatically retrieved from SSM Parameter Store. [cdk:skip]

Assertions.AssertDescription: CDK bootstrap stack version 6 required. Please run 'cdk bootstrap' with a recent version of the CDK CLI.
